label: live-baseline
description: Fresh retained screen baseline from the current quiet-latent-recentering live source.

label: quiet-divergence-relax-longgap-v1
description: Add quiet-gated divergence-memory relief after latent recentering, scaled by long-gap calmness.

label: quiet-divergence-relax-longgap-v2
description: Restrict quiet divergence-memory relief to the existing low-hazard, low-flow calm regime and strengthen it inside that smaller window.

label: quiet-divergence-relax-longgap-v3
description: Slightly widen the calm thresholds for post-recenter divergence relief and trim the decay strength.

label: threshold-calm-step-v1
description: Apply a tiny direct fee step-down only after long, already-quiet states.

label: threshold-event-surcharge-v1
description: Replace the linear observation carry with a thresholded event surcharge: lower charge in normal conditions, steeper only above an 8 bps event signal.

label: threshold-event-surcharge-v2
description: Lower the normal-condition event carry and push the burst threshold slightly higher while keeping a steep post-threshold slope.

label: threshold-event-surcharge-v3
description: Move halfway back toward the winning event-surcharge setting: slightly higher base carry than v2, same 8 bps threshold as v1, slightly softer post-threshold slope.

label: event-threshold-plus-quiet-v1
description: Keep the winning event-threshold incumbent and add a very narrow extra calm rebate only in long-gap, low-hazard, low-flow states.

label: hazard-weighted-event-v1
description: Weight hazard more than raw observation size inside the thresholded event signal and steepen the post-threshold slope.

label: threshold-event-surcharge-v4
description: Keep the winning event-threshold incumbent and raise only the post-threshold burst slope from 1500 to 1700 bps.

label: fixed-ultraquiet-rebate-v1
description: Keep the threshold-event incumbent but replace the broad calm rebate with a fixed 4-6 bps ultra-quiet rebate after long gaps.

label: directional-burst-shift-v1
description: Move part of the above-threshold burst charge from shared spread into a surcharge on the toxic side only.

label: directional-burst-shift-v2
description: Push more of the above-threshold burst slope onto the toxic side while keeping the total burst slope unchanged.
